>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/quantimed/quantimedImport/{programId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Import forecast data from Quantimed for a given program.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"description":"The ID of the program to import forecast data for","in":"path","name":"programId","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"multipart/form-data":{"schema":{"type":"string","format":"binary"}}},"description":"The file to import","required":true}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"dblDataInterval":{"type":"string"},"dtmDataExported":{"type":"string"},"dtmEnd":{"type":"string"},"dtmStart":{"type":"string"},"fileType":{"type":"string"},"products":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"innovatorName":{"type":"string"},"lowestUnitMeasure":{"type":"string"},"lowestUnitQuantity":{"type":"string"},"multiplier":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"productGroup":{"type":"string"},"productId":{"type":"string"},"productName":{"type":"string"},"programPlanningUnitId":{"type":"string"},"quantificationFactor":{"type":"string"},"source":{"type":"string"},"userDefined":{"type":"string"}},"title":"QuantimedImportProductDTO"}},"programId":{"type":"string"},"records":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"dtmPeriod":{"type":"string"},"ingAdjustments":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"ingConsumption":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"product":{"type":"object","properties":{"innovatorName":{"type":"string"},"lowestUnitMeasure":{"type":"string"},"lowestUnitQuantity":{"type":"string"},"multiplier":{"type":"integer","format":"int32"},"productGroup":{"type":"string"},"productId":{"type":"string"},"productName":{"type":"string"},"programPlanningUnitId":{"type":"string"},"quantificationFactor":{"type":"string"},"source":{"type":"string"},"userDefined":{"type":"string"}},"title":"QuantimedImportProductDTO"},"productId":{"type":"string"}},"title":"QuantimedImportRecordDTO"}},"sourceName":{"type":"string"}},"title":"QuantimedImportDTO"}}},"description":"Returns the QuantimedImportDTO object"},"500":{"content":{"text/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"messageCode":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ResponseCode"}}},"description":"Internal error while importing forecast data"}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
